problems.label: Clogged Drain
problems.description: Kitchen or bathroom drain backed up

problems.label: Water Heater
problems.description: No hot water, leaking tank, or pilot light issues

problems.label: Sewer Line
problems.description: Main sewer line backup or damage

problems.label: Garbage Disposal
problems.description: Disposal jammed, leaking, or not working

problems.label: Emergency
problems.description: Burst pipe, flooding, or gas smell

caller_personalities.label: Rushed
caller_personalities.behavior: In a hurry, gives short answers, wants fastest slot, may interrupt

caller_personalities.label: Chatty
caller_personalities.behavior: Talks a lot, shares backstory, goes on tangents, friendly but slow to get to the point

caller_personalities.label: Confused
caller_personalities.behavior: Unsure what's wrong, vague descriptions, needs help identifying the problem

caller_personalities.label: Angry
caller_personalities.behavior: Frustrated, had a bad experience before, complains, needs to be heard before scheduling

caller_personalities.label: Elderly
caller_personalities.behavior: Speaks slowly, may repeat themselves, needs clear simple language, appreciates patience

caller_personalities.label: Non-Native English
caller_personalities.behavior: Speaks English as second language, may use wrong terms, needs extra patience and clarification

conversation_paths.label: No Available Slots
conversation_paths.description: Requested time unavailable, agent offers alternatives

conversation_paths.label: Cancellation
conversation_paths.description: Caller wants to cancel existing appointment

conversation_paths.label: Question Only
conversation_paths.description: Caller just has a question, no booking needed

conversation_paths.label: Caller Hangup
conversation_paths.description: Caller ends call before booking completes

conversation_paths.label: DIY Recommendation
conversation_paths.description: Simple issue agent can help resolve over phone

conversation_paths.label: Caller Changes Mind
conversation_paths.description: Caller initially declines, then decides to book

phases.description: Suggest approach — DIY or send plumber
Ask when they want the appointment
Collect name/phone, read back all details
